abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} with a sling and score a strong hit, mark progress. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} by barraging your foe with sling bullets, mark progress on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} by launching stones at an advancing foe, you may hold them back. If you do [decide after rolling), get in control on a weak hit, but @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} [-1].

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by preparing stones of a special quality or material, and score a hit, take +5 pouch and mark your action die value. Then, when you make a move using that type of stones, suffer -1 pouch; if your lowest challenge die scores the marked value, take an automatic strong hit.
